name: GIGABYTE B650M GAMING PLUS WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE B650M GAMING PLUS WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5
description: Micro-ATX gaming motherboard for AM5 with PCIe 4.0, DDR5 support, and WiFi 6E connectivity.
